source.note: Generated from the real gitignored benchmark PDF; the PDF itself remains uncommitted.

required_invariants: The source PDF identity and SHA-256 are observed from the real benchmark input.
Every inline anchor in paper.md resolves exactly once through anchors.json.
Anchor provenance refers only to the frozen source or declared assets.
Suspicious instruction-like paper content is preserved and flagged as evidence.
The parse-verification report has passed status and zero unresolved anchors.
The dossier identifies the exact verified bundle.
Every paper-derived dossier item has at least one resolvable anchor.
Every dossier cross-reference resolves to an existing item.
Fixture manifest hashes match the committed generated artifact bytes.
